title: No __en or __out variables declared for top level inout ports

features.name: top_level_module_with_inout_ports
features.description: Code should include a top-level module (not instantiated under another module) with inout port declarations of varying bit widths
features.snippet:
module top_level
  (
   inout single_bit_io,
   inout [63:0] bus_64_io,
   inout [127:0] bus_128_io,
   input drv_en
   );

features.name: inout_port_conditionally_driven_by_ternary
features.description: Code should include inout ports that are conditionally driven using ternary operator based on an enable signal

features.name: inout_port_in_always_sensitivity_list
features.description: Code should include inout ports appearing in always block sensitivity list for monitoring bidirectional traffic
features.snippet:
always @(drv_en or bidir_single_bit_io or bidir_bus_64_io or bidir_bus_128_io)
  begin
    $display("bidir_single_bit_io = %b", bidir_single_bit_io);
  end

features.name: high_bitwidth_inout_ports
features.description: Code should include inout ports with 64-bit and 128-bit widths that are conditionally driven
